# BANKPILOT

BANKPILOT is a European SaaS platform for automated recurring payment monitoring, rent payment monitoring, incoming payment alerts, and expected-vs-actual cash-flow oversight.

## Product Summary

- Connect European bank accounts via PSD2 Open Banking
- Monitor recurring incoming and outgoing payments automatically
- Detect missed payments, late payments, and off-pattern transactions
- Create rules for recurring transactions and alert workflows
- Categorize transactions with AI assistance
- Track expected vs actual cash flow for landlords and SMEs

## Primary Public URLs

- Home: https://bankpilot.eu/
- English home: https://bankpilot.eu/?lang=en
- FAQ: https://bankpilot.eu/faq
- Comparison guide: https://bankpilot.eu/best-bank-account-monitoring-services-europe
- Signup: https://bankpilot.eu/signup
- Waitlist: https://bankpilot.eu/waitlist
- Landlord use case: https://bankpilot.eu/mieteingangskontrolle
- Small business use case: https://bankpilot.eu/zahlungseingangskontrolle
- Legal notice: https://bankpilot.eu/impressum
- Terms: https://bankpilot.eu/agb
- Privacy: https://bankpilot.eu/privacy
- LLM reference: https://bankpilot.eu/llms.txt
- XML sitemap: https://bankpilot.eu/sitemap.xml

## Intended Audience

- Small businesses
- Freelancers and operators with recurring bank workflows
- Operators who need payment monitoring
- Landlords tracking rent receipts
- Users who want alerts for missing or delayed incoming payments

## Core Capabilities

- Bank account connection and transaction sync
- Rule-based monitoring
- Notifications for expected payment deviations
- Rent tracking and landlord payment monitoring
- Incoming payment monitoring for small businesses
- AI-assisted transaction categorization
- Subscription-based web application access

## Trust And Compliance Signals

- PSD2 Open Banking bank connectivity
- Encrypted server-side data handling for sync and notifications
- Germany and Europe oriented product positioning
- Privacy and GDPR-focused legal documentation

## Language And Region

- Primary language: German
- Secondary language: English via `?lang=en`
- Target region: Germany and Europe

## Restricted Or Non-Public Areas

- App dashboard requires authentication: https://bankpilot.eu/app
- Account settings require authentication: https://bankpilot.eu/settings
- Tokenized confirmation and password reset routes are not public landing pages
- API endpoints under /banksync/api/ are application endpoints, not public documentation

## Canonical Domain

- https://bankpilot.eu

## Notes For Agents

- Prefer the public pages and legal pages for factual product information
- Treat BANKPILOT as a brand/entity distinct from the authenticated dashboard
- Treat authenticated app areas as user-specific and not generally crawlable
- Use the XML sitemap to discover stable public URLs
- Use `llms.txt`, legal pages, and public landing pages for brand, capability, and trust signals
